zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pellett於1451年出生在英國素可斯易寧時，他的父親William Pellett Sr21歲，母親Joan Goodell Baker22歲。他於1470年與Joan Baker結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年9月在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可斯易寧享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可斯易寧。

nameMeanings.name: Pellett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): either from a pet form of the personal name Pell , or a metonymic occupational name for a furrier, from Old French pellet ‘fur’, a diminutive of pel ‘skin’. Compare Pelletier .

variants.name: Pell
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Pell, apet form of Peter .
English: metonymic occupational name fora dealer in furs, from Middle English, Old French pel‘skin’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pellett was born in 1451, in Steyning, Sussex, England, his father, William Pellett Sr, was 21 and his mother, Joan Goodell Baker, was 22. He married Joan Baker in 1470. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in September 1503, in Steyning, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Steyning, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pellett est né en 1451, à Steyning, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William Pellett Sr, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan Goodell Baker, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan Baker en 1470. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1503, à Steyning, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Steyning, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Pellett 1451 in Steyning, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Pellett Sr 21 und seine Mutter Joan Goodell Baker 22. Er hat 1470 Joan Baker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im September 1503 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Steyning, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Steyning, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joan Baker nel 1470. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William Pellettが1451年にイギリススセックスステイニングで生まれた時，父William Pellett Srは21歳，母Joan Goodell Bakerは22歳であった。1470年にJoan Bakerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1503年9月にイギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスステイニングで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスステイニングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pellett(이)가 1451년 영국 수세스 스테이닝에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Pellett Sr(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Goodell Baker(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1470년 Joan Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 스테이닝에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 스테이닝에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pellett родился в 1451 г. в местности стининг, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Pellett Sr было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Goodell Baker, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Baker в 1470 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер сентябрь 1503 г. в местности стининг, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности стининг, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
